calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Off Calendar

Default Packet In Support Of Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Coast Range Investments LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:54 a.m.

J. Brian McCauley, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Gregory M. Bancroft, Executor, Estate of Paul Bancroft, III.
Mr. Bancroft was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. McCauley and Bancroft appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Coast Range Investments LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.

Plaintiff's Complaint of Promissory Note was filed on March 2, 2020, and personally served on defendant Coast Range Investments LLC's Registered Agent of Process on October 19, 2020.
Default as to defendant
Complaint for Money Due for Attorney Fees was filed on February 19, 2021, and personally served on defendant Sipree, Inc.'s Registered Agent of Process on March 14, 2021.
Default as to defendant Coast Range Investments LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, was entered on November 20, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 8, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Gregory M. Bancroft, Executor, Estate of Paul Bancroft, III, and against the defaulted defendant Coast Range Investments LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $500,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $77,260.00.
Costs - $551.90.

Total - $577,811.90.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 12:25 p.m.
